sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42459" key="e)ri/kh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρίκ-η</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρικ-ηρόν</orth>, etc., later spellings of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐρείκ-η, -ηρόν,</foreign> etc.</entryFree>
